text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm invited to join Mejiro Bright for a
conference at the Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The discussion concerns how to move forward
through the current trend in racing. It heavily
emphasizes speed, when the family's goal has
forever been producing well-rounded runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright seems to be unaffected. She is
determined to continue, like always, to protect
the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pledges to represent the new generation of
Mejiros and stand up against the changing times
by winning the spring Tenno Sho.
